title: Sub-item outlook integration
excerpt:
Can anyone help on this? 
I want to set the outlook integration that when an email is received, add it as an update - however the email column is in a subitem. 
Any suggestions?

posts.author: Linley221 (Linley Creese)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can anyone help on this?

I want to set the outlook integration that when an email is received, add it as an update - however the email column is in a subitem.

Any suggestions?

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Linley221 ,

Welcome to the monday community!

Unfortunately the native monday outlook/gmail integrations work only on the main item level.

So it is not really possible to add the emails as updates on the subitem level.

You would have to use a platform like Make.com to achieve this.

If you need any professional assistance with that, please feel free to let me know.

Best,
Giannis ,Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: Linley221 (Linley Creese)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there! Thanks so much for this.

Is there a specific way to use Make.com to make this happen?

Thanks again!

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@Linley221 ,
In Make, you can set up an Outlook integration that triggers an action when an email is received and adds it as an update, even if the email column is in a subitem.

If you are new to Make, here is our magic link to get 1 Month Pro plan free (10,000 operations):

posts.cookedHtml: @MsquareAutomation pretty much covered it

posts.cookedHtml: Thanks so much - are you able to help with the creation of my automation? I am just struggling to make sense of it all…

posts.cookedHtml: I have consulted our Make expert, and will get back to you soon!
